caption: A person's hand is shown mixing popcorn in a large metallic bowl. Some of the popcorn is white, while other pieces are dyed green. A woman with short blonde hair wearing a black long-sleeved shirt appears in a small circular inset window in the lower-left area of the scene. In the top-left corner of the view, a logo and text read "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION". As the sequence progresses, the hand continues to toss and turn the popcorn, blending the green and white pieces together. The woman in the inset remains still, looking toward the camera. The background outside the bowl is mostly obscured, though blue and white shapes resembling clouds are visible at the edges of the frame.
